report: Every time I try to log in through SSO it just bounces me straight back to the sign-in page. Can you report this?

The office wifi keeps dropping every few minutes for everyone sitting around me today. Can you report this?
Internal sites won't load for me — the browser says the server name can't be found, and colleagues nearby have the same problem. Please raise it.
group: Network issue: can't reach internal site

report: The MFA push notification keeps looping forever and never accepts my approval, so I can't finish signing in. Please report it.
Emails from clients outside the company are not reaching my inbox at all, internal mail works fine. Please raise this with IT.
group: Email issue: not receiving external mail

report: My wireless mouse eats through a fresh pair of batteries every couple of days — something must be wrong with it. Please file a ticket.
The software update finished on my machine but the app now crashes immediately on startup. Please open a ticket.
SSO login itself works, but after signing in I get 'permission denied' when opening the finance dashboard. Please report it.

trap_neighbor: Hardware issue: docking station not detected

report: Calendar events show up fine on my phone but every reminder fires exactly one hour late. Can you open a ticket?
